---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for claude-q
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the pain point. What does your current workflow look like and
where does it fall short?

## What would the ideal solution look like?

A clear description of what you want to happen. If there's a keyboard
shortcut / CLI command / UI element involved, sketch it.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've already tried or other tools that partially solve
this.

## Scope check

- [ ] This stays inside the "type-ahead queue wrapper" scope.
- [ ] Windows-only is fine, OR the feature has a clean cross-platform
      design.
- [ ] The new dependency budget is small (ideally zero).

(If any box is unchecked, explain below.)
